citizenInput: We need a maternity wing at the Umoja dispensary. Women are traveling too far to give birth.
budgetResult: Enacted Budget Line 42-B: Ksh 5,000,000 allocated for Umoja Dispensary Expansion.

citizenInput: Our cattle keep falling sick. We requested a cattle dip near Ruai market to control ticks.
budgetResult: Enacted Budget Line 17-C: Ksh 800,000 allocated of the Ksh 2,000,000 requested for Ruai Cattle Dip.

citizenInput: The Kayole–Soweto access road is impassable when it rains. We asked for grading and murraming.
budgetResult: No matching line found in the enacted budget. Request was not carried into FY 2025/26.

citizenInput: We need two more ECD classrooms at Dandora Primary. Toddlers are learning under a tree.
budgetResult: Enacted Budget Line 09-A: Ksh 3,200,000 allocated for ECD Classroom Construction, Dandora Area II.
